name: PinchTab Browser Automation
description: Browser automation via PinchTab's HTTP API (localhost:9867). Provides tools for web navigation, content extraction, element interaction, screenshots, and tab management. Requires a running PinchTab sidecar process.
brief: You have access to PinchTab browser automation tools. Load this skill with `use_skill('pinchtab')` to navigate the web, extract content, click elements, take screenshots, and manage browser tabs. Requires PinchTab running at localhost:9867.
author: Evonic

variables.name: pinchtab_host
variables.label: PinchTab Host
variables.description: Hostname where the PinchTab HTTP API is listening.

variables.name: pinchtab_port
variables.label: PinchTab Port
variables.description: Port where the PinchTab HTTP API is listening.
